prose: **Fukui reactivity indices for furan** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals) in PySCF (via chemkit), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (no optimization). Cation (N−1) state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion (N+1) state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. SCF converged cleanly. Most electrophilic site: atom 5 (C) with f₊ = 1.9242931; most nucleophilic site: atom 5 (C) with f₋ = 0.1616371. No warnings reported.
